page-community-support-alert-description: There is no company, support team, or help desk behind Ethereum. No one from ethereum.org will ever contact you. Transactions on the blockchain are final and cannot be reversed by anyone.
page-community-support-bridge-tokens: How to bridge tokens to layer 2
page-community-support-common-misconcept: Clearing up the most frequent misunderstandings about Ethereum.
page-community-support-common-scam-tacti: Common scam tactics and how to spot them
page-community-support-create-account: How to create an Ethereum account
page-community-support-full-security-gui: Full security and scam prevention guide
page-community-support-hero-subtitle-1: Whether you need help with a transaction, want to stay safe, or are just getting started, this page connects you to the right resources.
page-community-support-hero-subtitle-2: Ethereum is a decentralized network, not a company. ethereum.org is an educational website. It is not a wallet, exchange, or financial platform. We do not hold any funds and cannot access any accounts. No one from ethereum.org will ever contact you first. Anyone claiming otherwise is a scammer.

page-community-support-sent-wrong-addres: I sent to the wrong address
page-community-support-something-went-wr: If you lost funds, got scammed, or something unexpected happened, start here.
page-community-support-still-need-help-d: If you did not find what you were looking for, ask the community. Volunteers in these channels may be able to point you in the right direction.
